# TrendCraft

> A TypeScript library for technical analysis of financial data. Calculate 100+ indicators, detect signals, backtest strategies, optimize parameters, and build real-time trading pipelines.

## Installation

```bash
npm install trendcraft
```

All functions accept candle data and return `Series<T>` (`{ time: number, value: T }[]`).

```typescript
interface Candle {
  time: number | string | Date;
  open: number;
  high: number;
  low: number;
  close: number;
  volume: number;
}
type Series<T> = { time: number; value: T }[];
type PriceSource = 'open' | 'high' | 'low' | 'close' | 'hl2' | 'hlc3' | 'ohlc4';
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { sma, rsi, bollingerBands, goldenCross } from 'trendcraft';

const sma20 = sma(candles, { period: 20 });
const rsi14 = rsi(candles, { period: 14 });
const bb = bollingerBands(candles, { period: 20, stdDev: 2 });
const crosses = goldenCross(candles, { short: 5, long: 25 });

// Fluent API
import { TrendCraft } from 'trendcraft';
const result = TrendCraft.from(candles).sma(20).ema(12).rsi(14).compute();

// Backtesting
import { TrendCraft, goldenCross, deadCross, and, rsiBelow } from 'trendcraft';
const bt = TrendCraft.from(candles)
  .strategy()
    .entry(and(goldenCross(), rsiBelow(30)))
    .exit(deadCross())
  .backtest({ capital: 1000000, stopLoss: 5, takeProfit: 15 });
```

## Indicators — Moving Averages

### `sma(candles, { period, source? })`
Simple Moving Average. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `ema(candles, { period, source? })`
Exponential Moving Average. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `wma(candles, { period, source? })`
Weighted Moving Average. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `vwma(candles, { period })`
Volume Weighted Moving Average. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `kama(candles, { period?, fastPeriod?, slowPeriod?, source? })`
Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average. Adapts smoothing speed based on Efficiency Ratio — fast in trends, slow in choppy markets. Defaults: period=10, fastPeriod=2, slowPeriod=30. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `t3(candles, { period?, vFactor?, source? })`
Tillson T3 — ultra-smooth moving average using 6 cascaded EMAs with a volume factor. Provides minimal lag while extremely smooth. Defaults: period=5, vFactor=0.7. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `hma(candles, { period?, source? })`
Hull Moving Average — reduces lag using nested WMA: `HMA(n) = WMA(2*WMA(n/2) - WMA(n), sqrt(n))`. Default period: 9. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

## Indicators — Trend

### `ichimoku(candles, options?)`
Ichimoku Cloud. Options: `tenkanPeriod` (9), `kijunPeriod` (26), `senkouBPeriod` (52), `displacement` (26).

Returns `Series<{ tenkan, kijun, senkouA, senkouB, chikou }>` (all `number | null`).

### `supertrend(candles, options?)`
Supertrend. Options: `period` (10), `multiplier` (3).

Returns `Series<{ supertrend: number | null, direction: 1 | -1 | 0, upperBand, lowerBand }>`.

### `parabolicSar(candles, options?)`
Parabolic SAR. Options: `step` (0.02), `max` (0.2).

Returns `Series<{ sar, direction: 1 | -1 | 0, isReversal: boolean, af, ep }>`.

### `vortex(candles, { period })`
Vortex Indicator. Returns `Series<{ viPlus, viMinus }>`.

## Indicators — Momentum

### `rsi(candles, { period?, source? })`
Relative Strength Index (Wilder's smoothing). Default period: 14. Returns `Series<number | null>` (0-100).

### `macd(candles, { fast?, slow?, signal?, source? })`
MACD. Defaults: fast=12, slow=26, signal=9.

Returns `Series<{ macd: number | null, signal: number | null, histogram: number | null }>`.

### `stochastics(candles, { kPeriod?, dPeriod?, smoothK? })`
Stochastic Oscillator. Also: `fastStochastics()`, `slowStochastics()`.

Returns `Series<{ k: number | null, d: number | null }>`.

### `dmi(candles, { period?, adxPeriod? })`
Directional Movement Index with ADX. Defaults: period=14, adxPeriod=14.

Returns `Series<{ plusDi, minusDi, adx }>` (all `number | null`).

### `stochRsi(candles, { rsiPeriod?, stochPeriod?, kPeriod?, dPeriod? })`
Stochastic RSI. All defaults: 14/14/3/3. Returns `Series<{ k, d }>`.

### `cci(candles, { period?, constant? })`
Commodity Channel Index. Default period: 20. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `williamsR(candles, { period? })`
Williams %R. Default period: 14. Returns `Series<number | null>` (-100 to 0).

### `roc(candles, { period?, source? })`
Rate of Change. Default period: 12. Returns `Series<number | null>` (percentage).

### `trix(candles, { period })`
Triple EMA oscillator. Returns `Series<{ trix: number | null, signal: number | null }>`.

### `aroon(candles, { period })`
Aroon indicator. Returns `Series<{ up, down, oscillator }>` (all `number | null`).

### `dpo(candles, { period?, source? })`
Detrended Price Oscillator. Removes trend by comparing price to a shifted SMA. Last `floor(period/2)+1` bars are null (no future SMA available). Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `hurst(candles, { minWindow?, maxWindow?, source? })`
Hurst Exponent via Rescaled Range (R/S) analysis. Measures persistence: H>0.5 trending, H<0.5 mean-reverting, H≈0.5 random. Defaults: minWindow=20, maxWindow=100. Returns `Series<number | null>` (values in [0,1]).

### `connorsRsi(candles, { rsiPeriod?, streakPeriod?, rocPeriod? })`
Connors RSI — composite momentum oscillator: `(RSI(price) + RSI(streak) + PercentRank(ROC)) / 3`. Defaults: 3/2/100. Below 10 = oversold, above 90 = overbought. Returns `Series<{ crsi, rsi, streakRsi, rocPercentile }>` (all `number | null`).

## Indicators — Volatility

### `bollingerBands(candles, { period?, stdDev?, source? })`
Bollinger Bands. Defaults: period=20, stdDev=2.

Returns `Series<{ upper, middle, lower, percentB, bandwidth }>` (all `number | null`).

### `atr(candles, { period? })`
Average True Range (Wilder's method). Default period: 14. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `donchianChannel(candles, { period? })`
Donchian Channel. Default period: 20.

Returns `Series<{ upper, middle, lower }>` (all `number | null`).

### `keltnerChannel(candles, { emaPeriod?, atrPeriod?, multiplier? })`
Keltner Channel. Defaults: 20/10/2.

Returns `Series<{ upper, middle, lower }>` (all `number | null`).

### `chandelierExit(candles, { period?, multiplier? })`
Chandelier Exit trailing stop. Defaults: period=22, multiplier=3.

Returns `Series<{ longExit, shortExit, direction: 1 | -1, isCrossover: boolean }>`.

### `volatilityRegime(candles, options?)`
Classify volatility into regimes. Options: `atrPeriod` (14), `bbPeriod` (20), `lookbackPeriod` (100), `thresholds: { low: 25, high: 75, extreme: 95 }`.

Returns `Series<{ regime: 'low' | 'normal' | 'high' | 'extreme', atrPercentile, bandwidthPercentile, historicalVol, confidence }>`.

### `choppinessIndex(candles, { period? })`
Choppiness Index — measures if market is choppy or trending. `CHOP = 100 * LOG10(SUM(TR, n) / (HH - LL)) / LOG10(n)`. Default period: 14. Above 61.8 = choppy, below 38.2 = trending. Returns `Series<number | null>` (0-100).

## Indicators — Volume

### `obv(candles)`
On Balance Volume. Returns `Series<number>`.

### `mfi(candles, { period? })`
Money Flow Index. Default: 14. Returns `Series<number | null>` (0-100).

### `vwap(candles, { resetPeriod?, period?, bandMultipliers? })`
VWAP. resetPeriod: `'session'` (default) | `'rolling'` | number. Optional `bandMultipliers` (e.g., `[2, 3]`) adds ±nσ bands. Returns `Series<{ vwap, upper, lower, bands?: { upper, lower }[] }>`.

### `cmf(candles, { period? })`
Chaikin Money Flow. Default: 20. Returns `Series<number | null>` (-1 to +1).

### `volumeMa(candles, { period? })`
Volume Moving Average. Default: 20. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `volumeAnomaly(candles, { period?, highThreshold?, extremeThreshold? })`
Volume spike detection. Defaults: 20/2.0/3.0.

Returns `Series<{ volume, avgVolume, ratio, isAnomaly: boolean, level: 'normal' | 'high' | 'extreme' | null, zScore }>`.

### `volumeProfile(candles, { period?, numLevels?, valueAreaPercent? })`
Volume Profile. Returns `{ levels: VolumePriceLevel[], poc, vah, val, periodHigh, periodLow }`.

### `volumeProfileSeries(candles, options?)`
Rolling Volume Profile. Returns `Series<VolumeProfileValue | null>`.

### `volumeTrend(candles, { pricePeriod?, volumePeriod?, maPeriod?, minPriceChange? })`
Volume trend confirmation. Returns `Series<{ priceTrend, volumeTrend, isConfirmed, hasDivergence, confidence }>`.

### `adl(candles)`
Accumulation/Distribution Line. Returns `Series<number>`.

### `anchoredVwap(candles, { anchorTime, bands? })`
Anchored VWAP — cumulative VWAP from a specific anchor timestamp. `bands` (0/1/2) adds ±1σ/±2σ bands. Returns `Series<{ vwap, upper1?, lower1?, upper2?, lower2? }>` (all `number | null`).

## Indicators — Price

### `highest(candles, { period })` / `lowest(candles, { period })`
Highest High / Lowest Low. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `returns(candles, { period?, log? })` / `cumulativeReturns(candles)`
Price returns. Returns `Series<number | null>`.

### `pivotPoints(candles, { method? })`
Pivot Points. Methods: `'standard'` | `'fibonacci'` | `'woodie'` | `'camarilla'` | `'demark'`.

Returns `Series<{ pivot, r1, r2, r3, s1, s2, s3 }>`.

### `swingPoints(candles, { leftBars?, rightBars? })`
Swing highs and lows. Returns `Series<{ type: 'high' | 'low' | null, price }>`.

### `fibonacciRetracement(candles, { leftBars?, rightBars?, levels? })`
Fibonacci retracement. Returns `Series<{ levels: Record<string, number> | null, swingHigh, swingLow, trend: 'up' | 'down' | null }>`.

### `fractals(candles, { period? })`
Williams Fractals. Detects fractal highs and lows based on local extremes. Default period=2. Returns `Series<{ up: boolean, down: boolean, upPrice: number | null, downPrice: number | null }>`.

### `zigzag(candles, { deviation?, useAtr?, atrPeriod?, atrMultiplier? })`
Zigzag indicator. Connects significant swing points, filtering noise below the deviation threshold (default 5%). Supports ATR-based dynamic thresholds. Returns `Series<{ point: 'high' | 'low' | null, price: number | null, changePercent: number | null }>`.

### `openingRange(candles, { minutes?, sessionResetPeriod? })`
Opening Range Breakout (ORB). Detects the first N minutes' high/low of a session, then identifies breakouts. Defaults: minutes=30, sessionResetPeriod='day'. Returns `Series<{ high, low, breakout: 'above' | 'below' | null }>`.

### `gapAnalysis(candles, { minGapPercent? })`
Gap Analysis. Detects gap ups/downs, classifies as full/partial, and tracks fill status. Default minGapPercent: 0.5. Returns `Series<{ type: 'up' | 'down' | null, gapPercent, classification: 'full' | 'partial' | 'unfilled' | null, filled: boolean }>`.

## Indicators — Drawing Tools

### `autoTrendLine(candles, { leftBars?, rightBars? })`
Auto trend line. Returns `Series<{ resistance, support }>` (both `number | null`).

### `channelLine(candles, { leftBars?, rightBars? })`
Channel line. Returns `Series<{ upper, lower, middle, direction: 'up' | 'down' | null }>`.

### `fibonacciExtension(candles, { leftBars?, rightBars?, levels? })`
Fibonacci extension. Returns `Series<{ levels, pointA, pointB, pointC, direction: 'bullish' | 'bearish' | null }>`.

### `andrewsPitchfork(candles, { leftBars?, rightBars? })`
Andrew's Pitchfork. Returns `Series<{ median, upper, lower }>`.

## Indicators — Smart Money Concepts (SMC)

### `breakOfStructure(candles, { swingPeriod? })`
Break of Structure. Returns `Series<{ bullishBos, bearishBos, brokenLevel, trend: 'bullish' | 'bearish' | 'neutral', swingHighLevel, swingLowLevel }>`.

### `changeOfCharacter(candles, { swingPeriod? })`
Change of Character (trend reversal). Same return type as `breakOfStructure`.

### `orderBlock(candles, { swingPeriod?, volumePeriod?, minVolumeRatio?, maxActiveOBs?, partialMitigation? })`
Order Block detection. Returns `Series<{ newOrderBlock, activeOrderBlocks, mitigatedThisBar, atBullishOB, atBearishOB }>`.

Helpers: `getActiveOrderBlocks(candles, opts?)`, `getNearestOrderBlock(candles, opts?)`.

### `liquiditySweep(candles, { swingPeriod?, maxRecoveryBars?, maxTrackedSweeps?, minSweepDepth? })`
Liquidity Sweep detection. Returns `Series<{ isSweep, sweep, recentSweeps, recoveredThisBar }>`.

Helpers: `getRecoveredSweeps(candles, opts?)`, `hasRecentSweepSignal(candles, type?, opts?)`.

### `fairValueGap(candles, opts?)`
Fair Value Gap. Helpers: `getUnfilledFvgs()`, `getNearestFvg()`.

## Indicators — Other

### `heikinAshi(candles)`
Heikin-Ashi candles. Returns `Series<HeikinAshiValue>`.

### `superSmoother(candles, opts?)` / `roofingFilter(candles, opts?)`
Ehlers filters for noise reduction.

### `benchmarkRS(candles, benchmark, { period?, smaPeriod?, rankingLookback? })`
Relative Strength vs benchmark. Returns `Series<{ rs, rsRating, trend, mansfieldRS, outperformance }>`.

Multi-symbol: `rankByRS()`, `topByRS()`, `bottomByRS()`, `filterByRSPercentile()`, `compareRS()`.

### `calculateAtrPercent(candles)` / `atrPercentSeries(candles)` / `filterStocksByAtr()`
ATR as percentage of price for stock screening.

## Indicators — Adaptive

### `adaptiveRsi(candles, options?)`
RSI whose period adapts based on ATR volatility percentile. High volatility uses shorter period (faster response), low volatility uses longer period. Options: `basePeriod` (14), `minPeriod` (6), `maxPeriod` (28), `atrPeriod` (14), `volLookback` (100). Returns `Series<{ rsi, effectivePeriod, volatilityPercentile }>`.

### `adaptiveBollinger(candles, options?)`
Bollinger Bands with kurtosis-adaptive standard deviation multiplier. Fat tails (high kurtosis) produce wider bands. Options: `period` (20), `baseStdDev` (2), `kurtosisLookback` (100), `minMultiplier` (1.5), `maxMultiplier` (3.0). Returns `Series<{ upper, middle, lower, bandwidth, effectiveMultiplier, kurtosis }>`.

### `adaptiveMa(candles, options?)`
MA with Efficiency Ratio-based adaptive smoothing. Trending market: fast smoothing. Choppy market: slow smoothing. Options: `erPeriod` (10), `fastConstant` (0.6667), `slowConstant` (0.0645). Returns `Series<{ value, efficiencyRatio, smoothingConstant }>`.

### `adaptiveStochastics(candles, options?)`
Stochastics with ADX-adaptive lookback period. Strong trend: longer period (avoid whipsaws). Weak trend: shorter period. Options: `basePeriod` (14), `minPeriod` (5), `maxPeriod` (21), `adxPeriod` (14), `adxThreshold` (40), `kSmoothing` (3), `dSmoothing` (3). Returns `Series<{ k, d, effectivePeriod, adx }>`.

## Signals — Cross Detection

### `crossOver(series1, series2)` / `crossUnder(series1, series2)`
Generic crossover detection. Returns `Signal[]` (`{ time, type: 'bullish' | 'bearish' }`).

### `goldenCross(candles, { short, long })` / `deadCross(candles, { short, long })`
MA cross signals. Returns `Signal[]`.

### `validateCrossSignals(candles, options)`
Cross signals with quality assessment. Returns `CrossSignalQuality[]` with `isFake`, `volumeConfirmed`, `trendConfirmed`, etc.

## Signals — Divergence

### `rsiDivergence(candles, opts?)` / `macdDivergence(candles, opts?)` / `obvDivergence(candles, opts?)`
Divergence detection. Options: `swingLookback` (5), `minSwingDistance` (5), `maxSwingDistance` (60).

Returns `DivergenceSignal[]` (`{ time, type: 'bullish' | 'bearish', firstIdx, secondIdx, price, indicator }`).

### `detectDivergence(candles, indicator, opts?)`
Generic divergence detection against any indicator series.

## Signals — Patterns

### `bollingerSqueeze(candles, { period?, stdDev?, lookback?, threshold? })`
Low volatility squeeze. Returns `SqueezeSignal[]`.

### `perfectOrder(candles, opts?)` / `perfectOrderEnhanced(candles, opts?)`
Perfect Order detection with slope analysis and state tracking.

### `rangeBound(candles, opts?)`
Range-bound market detection. Returns `Series<RangeBoundValue>` with states: `NEUTRAL`, `RANGE_FORMING`, `RANGE_CONFIRMED`, `RANGE_TIGHT`, `BREAKOUT_RISK_UP`, `BREAKOUT_RISK_DOWN`, `TRENDING`.

### Volume Signals
- `volumeBreakout(candles, { period? })` — Volume breaks N-day high
- `volumeAccumulation(candles, { period?, minSlope?, minConsecutiveDays?, minR2? })` — Volume accumulation via regression
- `volumeAboveAverage(candles, { period?, minRatio?, minConsecutiveDays? })` — Sustained high volume
- `volumeMaCross(candles, { shortPeriod?, longPeriod? })` — Volume MA crossovers

### Price Patterns
- `doubleTop(candles, opts?)` / `doubleBottom(candles, opts?)` — Double top/bottom
- `headAndShoulders(candles, opts?)` / `inverseHeadAndShoulders(candles, opts?)` — H&S patterns
- `cupWithHandle(candles, opts?)` — Cup with handle
- `detectTriangle(candles, opts?)` — Symmetrical, ascending, descending triangles (OLS trendline fitting)
- `detectWedge(candles, opts?)` — Rising wedge (bearish reversal), falling wedge (bullish reversal)
- `detectChannel(candles, opts?)` — Ascending, descending, horizontal channels (parallel trendlines)
- `detectFlag(candles, opts?)` — Bull/bear flags and pennants (flagpole + consolidation)
- `filterPatterns(patterns, candles, opts?)` — Context filter: ATR ratio, trend direction, volume confirmation
- `fitTrendline(points)` / `fitTrendlinePair(highs, lows)` — Trendline fitting utilities
- `classifyTrendlinePair(upper, lower)` — Classify trendline pair relationship

All return `PatternSignal[]` with `confidence` (0-100), `confirmed` (boolean), `pattern.target`, `pattern.stopLoss`.
PatternType includes: `double_top`, `double_bottom`, `head_shoulders`, `inverse_head_shoulders`, `cup_handle`, `triangle_symmetrical`, `triangle_ascending`, `triangle_descending`, `rising_wedge`, `falling_wedge`, `channel_ascending`, `channel_descending`, `channel_horizontal`, `bull_flag`, `bear_flag`, `bull_pennant`, `bear_pennant`.

### `candlestickPatterns(candles, opts?)`
Candlestick pattern recognition (hammer, engulfing, doji, etc.).

## Signals — TradeSignal (Unified Format)

```typescript
type TradeSignal = {
  id: string;
  time: number;
  action: 'BUY' | 'SELL' | 'CLOSE';
  direction: 'LONG' | 'SHORT';
  confidence: number;        // 0-100
  prices?: { entry?, stopLoss?, takeProfit? };
  reasons: { source, name, detail? }[];
  timeframe?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
};
```

### Signal Converters
- `fromCrossSignal(signal, entryPrice?)` — Cross → TradeSignal
- `fromDivergenceSignal(signal, entryPrice?)` — Divergence → TradeSignal
- `fromSqueezeSignal(signal, direction?, entryPrice?)` — Squeeze → TradeSignal
- `fromPatternSignal(signal, entryPrice?)` — Pattern → TradeSignal (maps target/stopLoss)
- `fromScoreResult(score, time, { minScore?, direction?, entryPrice? })` — Score → TradeSignal
- `fromPipelineResult(result, time, entryPrice?)` — Pipeline → TradeSignal

### Signal Lifecycle
```typescript
import { createSignalManager, processSignalsBatch } from 'trendcraft';

const manager = createSignalManager({
  cooldown: { bars: 5 },    // Suppress duplicates for 5 bars
  debounce: { bars: 3 },    // Require 3 consecutive bars
  expiry: { bars: 10 },     // Expire after 10 bars
});

const activated = manager.onBar(signals, barTime);
manager.fill(signal.id);
manager.cancel(signal.id);
```

Signal states: `PENDING` → `ACTIVE` → `EXPIRED` / `FILLED` / `CANCELLED`.

## Backtesting

### `runBacktest(candles, entry, exit, options)`

```typescript
import { runBacktest, goldenCross, deadCross } from 'trendcraft';

const result = runBacktest(candles, goldenCross(5, 25), deadCross(5, 25), {
  capital: 1000000,
  commission: 0,
  commissionRate: 0.1,      // 0.1%
  slippage: 0.05,            // 0.05%
  stopLoss: 5,               // 5%
  takeProfit: 10,            // 10%
  trailingStop: 3,           // 3%
  taxRate: 20.315,
  fillMode: 'next-bar-open', // default, prevents look-ahead bias
  slTpMode: 'close-only',   // default, prevents look-ahead bias
  direction: 'long',         // or 'short'
});
```

**BacktestResult:**
```typescript
interface BacktestResult {
  initialCapital: number;
  finalCapital: number;
  totalReturn: number;
  totalReturnPercent: number;
  tradeCount: number;
  winRate: number;            // %
  maxDrawdown: number;        // %
  sharpeRatio: number;
  profitFactor: number;
  avgHoldingDays: number;
  trades: Trade[];
  settings: BacktestSettings;
  drawdownPeriods: DrawdownPeriod[];  // Individual peak-trough-recovery periods
}
```

### Fluent API Backtesting
```typescript
const result = TrendCraft.from(candles)
  .strategy()
    .entry(and(goldenCross(), rsiBelow(30)))
    .exit(or(deadCross(), rsiAbove(70)))
  .backtest({ capital: 1000000 });

// With MTF
const result = TrendCraft.from(dailyCandles)
  .withMtf(['weekly'])
  .strategy()
    .entry(and(weeklyRsiAbove(50), goldenCrossCondition()))
    .exit(deadCrossCondition())
  .backtest({ capital: 1000000 });
```

### Condition Combinators
- `and(...conditions)` / `or(...conditions)` / `not(condition)`

### Custom Condition Function
```typescript
const custom = (indicators, candle, index, candles) => {
  return candle.volume > 1000000 && candle.close > candle.open;
};
```

### Preset Conditions (50+)

**Moving Average:**
- `goldenCrossCondition(short?, long?)` — Short MA crosses above Long MA
- `deadCrossCondition(short?, long?)` — Short MA crosses below Long MA
- `priceAboveSma(period)` / `priceBelowSma(period)` — Price vs SMA
- `validatedGoldenCross(opts)` / `validatedDeadCross(opts)` — With fake signal detection
- `priceDroppedAtr(multiplier, period)` — Price dropped N*ATR

**RSI:**
- `rsiBelow(threshold?, period?)` — RSI < threshold (default: 30, 14)
- `rsiAbove(threshold?, period?)` — RSI > threshold (default: 70, 14)

**MACD:**
- `macdCrossUp(fast?, slow?, signal?)` / `macdCrossDown(fast?, slow?, signal?)`

**Bollinger Bands:**
- `bollingerBreakout('upper' | 'lower', period?, stdDev?)` — Price breaks band
- `bollingerTouch('upper' | 'lower', period?, stdDev?)` — Price touches band

**Stochastics:**
- `stochBelow(val)` / `stochAbove(val)` / `stochCrossUp()` / `stochCrossDown()`

**DMI/ADX:**
- `dmiBullish()` / `dmiBearish()` / `adxStrong(threshold?)`

**Perfect Order:**
- `perfectOrderBullish()` / `perfectOrderBearish()` / `perfectOrderCollapsed()`
- `perfectOrderActiveBullish()` / `perfectOrderActiveBearish()`
- `perfectOrderBullishConfirmed()` / `perfectOrderBearishConfirmed()`
- `perfectOrderPreBullish()` / `perfectOrderPreBearish()`
- `poPlusEntry()` / `pbEntry()` / `poPlusPbEntry()`

**Volume:**
- `volumeAboveAvg(multiplier)` — Volume above average
- `volumeAnomalyCondition(threshold?)` / `volumeExtreme()` / `volumeRatioAbove(ratio)`
- `nearPoc(tolerance?)` / `inValueArea()` / `breakoutVah()` / `breakdownVal()`
- `priceAbovePoc()` / `priceBelowPoc()`
- `volumeConfirmsTrend()` / `volumeDivergence()` / `bullishVolumeDivergence()` / `bearishVolumeDivergence()`
- `volumeTrendConfidence(min)` — Confidence above threshold
- `cmfAbove(threshold?, period?)` / `cmfBelow(threshold?, period?)` — CMF conditions
- `obvRising(period?)` / `obvFalling(period?)` / `obvCrossUp(short?, long?)` / `obvCrossDown(short?, long?)`

**Range-Bound:**
- `inRangeBound()` / `rangeForming()` / `rangeConfirmed()` / `rangeBreakout()`
- `tightRange()` / `breakoutRiskUp()` / `breakoutRiskDown()` / `rangeScoreAbove(threshold)`

**Volatility Regime:**
- `regimeIs('low' | 'normal' | 'high' | 'extreme')` / `regimeNot(regime)`
- `volatilityAbove(percentile)` / `volatilityBelow(percentile)`
- `atrPercentileAbove(val)` / `atrPercentileBelow(val)`
- `volatilityExpanding(threshold?, lookback?)` / `volatilityContracting(threshold?, lookback?)`
- `atrPercentAbove(threshold)` / `atrPercentBelow(threshold)`

**MTF (Multi-Timeframe):**
- `weeklyRsiAbove(val)` / `weeklyRsiBelow(val)` / `monthlyRsiAbove(val)` / `monthlyRsiBelow(val)`
- `mtfRsiAbove(timeframe, val)` / `mtfRsiBelow(timeframe, val)`
- `weeklyPriceAboveSma(period)` / `weeklyPriceBelowSma(period)` / `monthlyPriceAboveSma(period)`
- `mtfPriceAboveSma(timeframe, period)` / `mtfPriceBelowSma(timeframe, period)`
- `weeklyPriceAboveEma(period)` / `mtfPriceAboveEma(timeframe, period)`
- `weeklyUptrend()` / `weeklyDowntrend()` / `mtfUptrend(tf)` / `mtfDowntrend(tf)`
- `weeklyTrendStrong(adxThreshold?)` / `monthlyTrendStrong()` / `mtfTrendStrong(tf, threshold?)`
- `mtfCondition(timeframe, fn)` — Custom MTF condition

**Relative Strength (RS):**
- `rsAbove(threshold)` / `rsBelow(threshold)` / `rsRising()` / `rsFalling()`
- `rsNewHigh(lookback?)` / `rsNewLow(lookback?)`
- `rsRatingAbove(rating)` / `rsRatingBelow(rating)`
- `mansfieldRSAbove(threshold)` / `mansfieldRSBelow(threshold)`
- `outperformanceAbove(percent)` / `outperformanceBelow(percent)`
- `setBenchmark(indicators, benchmarkCandles)` — Required before RS conditions

**Price Patterns:**
- `patternDetected(type, opts?)` / `patternConfirmed(type, opts?)`
- `anyBullishPattern(opts?)` / `anyBearishPattern(opts?)`
- `patternConfidenceAbove(type, min)` / `anyPatternConfidenceAbove(min)`
- `patternWithinBars(type, lookback, opts?)`
- `doubleTopDetected()` / `doubleBottomDetected()` / `headShouldersDetected()` / `inverseHeadShouldersDetected()` / `cupHandleDetected()`
- `triangleDetected(subtype?)` / `wedgeDetected(subtype?)` / `channelDetected(subtype?)` / `flagDetected(subtype?)`
- `bullFlagDetected()` / `bearFlagDetected()`

**Fundamentals:**
- `perBelow(val)` / `perAbove(val)` / `perBetween(min, max)` — P/E ratio
- `pbrBelow(val)` / `pbrAbove(val)` / `pbrBetween(min, max)` — P/B ratio

### Short Selling

```typescript
const result = runBacktest(candles, deadCross(5, 25), goldenCross(5, 25), {
  capital: 1000000,
  direction: 'short',
  stopLoss: 5,       // Triggers at entry * 1.05 (price rises)
  takeProfit: 5,     // Triggers at entry * 0.95 (price drops)
  trailingStop: 3,   // Trails from lowest price
});
```

### Scaled Entry

```typescript
import { runBacktestScaled } from 'trendcraft';

const result = runBacktestScaled(candles, entry, exit, {
  capital: 1000000,
  scaledEntry: {
    tranches: 3,
    strategy: 'pyramid',       // 50%, 33%, 17%  (also: 'equal', 'reverse-pyramid')
    intervalType: 'price',     // or 'signal'
    priceInterval: -2,         // Add on 2% dips
  },
});
```

## Optimization

### `gridSearch(candles, strategyFactory, paramRanges, options?)`

```typescript
import { gridSearch, param, constraint } from 'trendcraft';

const result = gridSearch(candles, (params) => ({
  entry: goldenCross(params.short, params.long),
  exit: deadCross(params.short, params.long),
}), [
  param('short', [5, 10, 15, 20]),
  param('long', [25, 50, 75]),
], {
  metric: 'sharpeRatio',  // or 'calmarRatio' | 'recoveryFactor' | 'totalReturn' | 'winRate' | 'profitFactor'
  constraints: [constraint('winRate', '>=', 40), constraint('maxDrawdown', '<=', 30)],
  topN: 10,
});
```

Returns `GridSearchResult` with `results[]`, `bestParameters`, `bestMetrics`.

### `walkForwardAnalysis(candles, strategyFactory, paramRanges, options?)`
Out-of-sample validation. Options: `inSampleRatio` (0.7), `periods` (5), `metric`.

### `anchoredWalkForwardAnalysis(candles, entryPool, exitPool, options?)`
Expanding training window. Options: `anchorDate`, `initialTrainSize` (504), `expansionStep` (252), `testSize` (252).

Returns `AWFResult` with `periods[]`, `aggregateMetrics`, `stabilityAnalysis` (condition frequency, stable conditions, consistency score), `recommendation`.

### `combinationSearch(candles, entryPool, exitPool, options?)`
Find optimal entry/exit combinations. Use `createEntryConditionPool()` and `createExitConditionPool()` for default pools.

### `runMonteCarloSimulation(backtestResult, options?)`
Statistical significance test. Options: `simulations` (1000), `seed`, `confidenceLevel` (0.95).

Returns `MonteCarloResult` with `pValue`, `assessment.isSignificant`, `confidenceInterval`.

### Metrics
- `calculateSharpeRatio(returns, riskFreeRate?)`
- `calculateCalmarRatio(totalReturn, maxDrawdown, years)`
- `calculateRecoveryFactor(totalReturn, maxDrawdown)`
- `calculateAllMetrics(backtestResult)`

## Streaming

Real-time trading infrastructure with 6 layers. All components are stateful, serializable (`getState()`), and restorable (`fromState`).

```
Layer 1: Ticks → createCandleAggregator → Candles → createCandleResampler → Higher-TF Candles
Layer 2: Signal Detectors (crossover, threshold, squeeze, divergence)
Layer 3: Conditions with and/or/not combinators
Layer 4: createPipeline (indicators + conditions → signals) + createStreamingMtf
Layer 5: createTradingSession + createGuardedSession (risk/time guards)
Layer 6: createPositionTracker + createManagedSession (SL/TP/trailing/P&L)
```

### Layer 1: Candle Aggregation

```typescript
import { streaming } from 'trendcraft';

const agg = streaming.createCandleAggregator({ intervalMs: 60_000 });
const candle = agg.addTrade({ time: Date.now(), price: 100, volume: 10 }); // null or completed candle
agg.flush(); // Force-close current candle

const resampler = streaming.createCandleResampler({ targetIntervalMs: 300_000 }); // 1m → 5m
const candle5m = resampler.addCandle(candle1m);
```

### Layer 2: Signal Detectors

```typescript
const crossOver = streaming.createCrossOverDetector();
crossOver.next(21, 20); // true when valueA crosses above valueB

const crossUnder = streaming.createCrossUnderDetector();
crossUnder.next(9, 10); // true when valueA crosses below valueB

const threshold = streaming.createThresholdDetector(70);
threshold.next(72); // { crossAbove: true, crossBelow: false }

const squeeze = streaming.createSqueezeDetector({ bandwidthThreshold: 0.05 });
squeeze.next(0.04); // { squeezeStart: true, squeezeEnd: false, inSqueeze: true }

const divergence = streaming.createDivergenceDetector({ lookback: 14 });
divergence.next(price, rsiValue); // { bullish: boolean, bearish: boolean }
```

All detectors support `next()`, `peek()` (preview without state change), and `getState()`.

### Layer 3: Conditions

```typescript
import { streaming } from 'trendcraft';

const entry = streaming.and(streaming.rsiBelow(30), streaming.smaGoldenCross());
const exit = streaming.or(streaming.rsiAbove(70), streaming.smaDeadCross());

// Preset conditions: rsiBelow, rsiAbove, smaGoldenCross, smaDeadCross,
// macdPositive, macdNegative, priceAbove, priceBelow, indicatorAbove, indicatorBelow
```

### Layer 4: Pipeline & MTF

```typescript
import { streaming } from 'trendcraft';
import { incremental } from 'trendcraft';

const pipeline = streaming.createPipeline({
  indicators: [
    { name: 'rsi', create: () => incremental.createRsi({ period: 14 }) },
    { name: 'sma20', create: () => incremental.createSma({ period: 20 }) },
  ],
  entry: streaming.rsiBelow(30),
  exit: streaming.rsiAbove(70),
  signals: [{ name: 'oversold', condition: streaming.rsiBelow(20) }],
});

const result = pipeline.next(candle);
// { snapshot: {...}, entrySignal: boolean, exitSignal: boolean, signals: string[] }

// Multi-Timeframe
const mtf = streaming.createStreamingMtf({
  timeframes: [
    { intervalMs: 300_000, indicators: [{ name: 'sma20', create: () => incremental.createSma({ period: 20 }) }] },
  ],
});
const snapshot = mtf.next(candle1m); // { "5m": { sma20: ... } }
```

### Layer 5: Session & Guards

```typescript
const session = streaming.createTradingSession({
  intervalMs: 60_000,
  pipeline: { indicators: [...], entry: ..., exit: ... },
  warmUp: historicalCandles,
});

const events = session.onTrade({ time, price, volume });
// Events: 'candle' | 'signal' | 'entry' | 'exit' | 'partial' | 'blocked' | 'force-close'

// Risk Guard
const riskGuard = streaming.createRiskGuard({
  maxDailyLoss: -50000,
  maxDailyTrades: 20,
  maxConsecutiveLosses: 3,
  cooldownMs: 30 * 60_000,
});

// Time Guard
const timeGuard = streaming.createTimeGuard({
  tradingWindows: [{ startMs: 9 * 3600_000, endMs: 15 * 3600_000 }],
  timezoneOffsetMs: 9 * 3600_000,
  forceCloseBeforeEndMs: 5 * 60_000,
  blackoutPeriods: [{ startTime, endTime, reason: 'FOMC' }],
});

// Combined
const guarded = streaming.createGuardedSession(sessionOpts, {
  riskGuard: { maxDailyLoss: -50000 },
  timeGuard: { tradingWindows: [...] },
});
```

### Layer 6: Position Management

```typescript
const tracker = streaming.createPositionTracker({
  capital: 1_000_000,
  stopLoss: 2,
  takeProfit: 6,
  trailingStop: 3,
  commissionRate: 0.1,
  slippage: 0.05,
});

tracker.openPosition(price, shares, time);
const { triggered } = tracker.updatePrice(candle); // Check SL/TP/trailing
tracker.closePosition(price, time, reason);

// Full managed session (tick → signal → position → P&L)
const managed = streaming.createManagedSession(
  sessionOpts,
  { riskGuard: {...}, timeGuard: {...} },
  {
    capital: 1_000_000,
    sizing: { method: 'risk-based', riskPercent: 1 },
    // also: 'full-capital' | 'fixed-fractional' | 'atr-based'
    stopLoss: 2,
    takeProfit: 6,
    trailingStop: 3,
  },
);

const events = managed.onTrade({ time, price, volume });
// Events: all session events + 'position-opened' | 'position-closed' | 'position-update'
```

### Signal Emitter

```typescript
const emitter = streaming.createSignalEmitter({
  intervalMs: 60000,
  pipeline: { indicators: [...], entry: ..., exit: ... },
  onSignal: (signal: TradeSignal) => { console.log(signal.action); },
});

emitter.onTrade({ time, price, volume });
emitter.close();
```

## Scoring

### ScoreBuilder

```typescript
import { ScoreBuilder, calculateScore, calculateScoreBreakdown, calculateScoreSeries } from 'trendcraft';

const config = ScoreBuilder.create()
  .addRsiOversold(30, 2.0)          // threshold, weight
  .addRsiOverbought(70, 2.0)
  .addMacdBullish(1.5)
  .addMacdBearish(1.5)
  .addPerfectOrderBullish(2.0)
  .addPOConfirmation(3.0)
  .addPullbackEntry(20, 1.5)        // maPeriod, weight
  .addGoldenCross(5, 25, 1.0)       // short, long, weight
  .addPriceAboveEma(50, 1.0)
  .addVolumeSpike(1.5, 1.5)         // threshold, weight
  .addVolumeAnomaly(2.0, 1.0)       // zThreshold, weight
  .addBullishVolumeTrend(1.0)
  .addCmfPositive(0, 1.0)
  .addStochOversold(20, 1.0)
  .addStochBullishCross(20, 1.0)
  .setThresholds(70, 50, 30)        // strong, moderate, weak
  .build();

const score = calculateScore(candles, index, config);
// { rawScore, normalizedScore: 0-100, maxScore, strength: 'strong' | 'moderate' | 'weak' | 'none', activeSignals, totalSignals }

const breakdown = calculateScoreBreakdown(candles, index, config);
// Includes contributions[] array

const series = calculateScoreSeries(candles, config);
```

### Presets
```typescript
import { getPreset, listPresets } from 'trendcraft';

const config = getPreset('trendFollowing');
// Available: 'momentum', 'meanReversion', 'trendFollowing', 'balanced', 'aggressive', 'conservative'
```

### Score Backtest Conditions
- `scoreAbove(threshold, configOrPreset)` / `scoreBelow(threshold, configOrPreset)`
- `scoreStrength('strong' | 'moderate' | 'weak', config)`
- `minActiveSignals(count, config)` / `scoreWithMinSignals(threshold, minActive, config)`
- `scoreIncreasing(minIncrease, config)`

## Position Sizing

### `riskBasedSize(options)`
```typescript
const result = riskBasedSize({
  accountSize: 100000,
  entryPrice: 50,
  stopLossPrice: 48,
  riskPercent: 1,            // Risk 1% of account
  maxPositionPercent: 25,
  direction: 'long',         // or 'short'
});
// { shares: 500, positionValue: 25000, riskAmount: 1000, method: 'risk-based' }
```

### `atrBasedSize(options)`
```typescript
const result = atrBasedSize({
  accountSize: 100000,
  entryPrice: 50,
  atrValue: 2.5,
  atrMultiplier: 2,
  riskPercent: 1,
});
// stopPrice: 45, shares: 200
```

### `kellySize(options)`
```typescript
const result = kellySize({
  accountSize: 100000,
  entryPrice: 50,
  winRate: 0.6,
  winLossRatio: 1.5,
  kellyFraction: 0.5,       // Half-Kelly
  maxKellyPercent: 25,
});
```

### `fixedFractionalSize(options)`
```typescript
const result = fixedFractionalSize({
  accountSize: 100000,
  entryPrice: 50,
  fractionPercent: 10,
});
```

Helpers: `calculateKellyPercent(winRate, winLossRatio)`, `maxPositions(accountSize, fraction)`, `fractionForPositionCount(n)`, `calculateAtrStopDistance(atr, multiplier)`, `recommendedAtrMultiplier(style)`.

## ATR Risk Management

### `chandelierExit(candles, { period?, multiplier? })`
Trailing stop. Returns `Series<{ longExit, shortExit, direction, isCrossover }>`.

### `atrStops(candles, { atrPeriod?, stopMultiplier?, takeProfitMultiplier? })`
ATR-based stop/TP levels. Returns `Series<{ atr, stopDistance, takeProfitDistance, longStop, longTakeProfit, shortStop, shortTakeProfit }>`.

Standalone helpers: `calculateAtrStop(opts)`, `calculateAtrTakeProfit(opts)`, `calculateAtrTrailingStop(opts)`.

Backtest integration:
```typescript
runBacktest(candles, entry, exit, {
  atrRisk: { atrPeriod: 14, atrStopMultiplier: 2.5, atrTakeProfitMultiplier: 4, atrTrailingMultiplier: 2 },
});
```

## Data Utilities

### Normalization
- `normalizeCandles(candles)` — Normalize date formats to Unix timestamps
- `normalizeCandle(candle)` — Single candle
- `normalizeTime(time)` — Time value only
- `getPrice(candle, source)` / `getPriceSeries(candles, source)` — Extract price by source

### Resampling
- `resample(candles, 'weekly' | 'monthly' | '1w' | '1M')` — Timeframe resampling

### Validation
```typescript
import { validateCandles, normalizeAndValidate } from 'trendcraft';

const result = validateCandles(candles, {
  gaps: true,           // or GapDetectionOptions
  duplicates: true,
  ohlc: true,
  spikes: true,         // or SpikeDetectionOptions
  volumeAnomalies: true,
  stale: true,
  splits: false,
  autoClean: true,      // Return cleaned candles
});

// All-in-one
const { candles: normalized, validation } = normalizeAndValidate(rawCandles, { autoClean: true });
```

Individual detectors: `detectGaps()`, `detectDuplicates()`, `removeDuplicates()`, `detectOhlcErrors()`, `detectPriceSpikes()`, `detectVolumeAnomalies()`, `detectStaleData()`, `detectSplitHints()`.

### Screening
- `screenStock(candles, criteria)` — Screen single stock
- `createCriteriaFromNames(entryNames, exitNames)` — Create from preset names
- `CONDITION_PRESETS` — All available preset names
- `parseCsv(csvString)` — Parse CSV to candles

### Fundamentals
- `parseFundamentals(data, opts?)` — Parse fundamental data
- `createFundamentalsMap(data)` / `getFundamentalsAt(map, time)` — Time-indexed access

### Trade Analysis
- `analyzeAllTrades(trades)` — Full analysis
- `calculateTradeStats(trades)` — Basic stats
- `analyzeByExitReason(trades)` / `analyzeByHoldingPeriod(trades)` / `analyzeByTime(trades)`
- `analyzeMfeMae(trades)` / `analyzeStreaks(trades)`
- `analyzeDrawdowns(result.drawdownPeriods)` — Drawdown period analysis (count, avg/max depth, recovery rate, worst drawdown)

### Pattern Projection
- `projectPatternOutcome(candles, events, extractor, opts?)` — Project price outcomes after events with confidence bounds and hit rates
- `projectFromPatterns(candles, signals, opts?)` — Pattern projection with auto direction detection (bearish patterns have returns inverted)
- `projectFromSeries(candles, series, opts?)` — Project outcomes from indicator series (truthy values = events)

## Plugin System

```typescript
import { defineIndicator, TrendCraft, plugins } from 'trendcraft';

// Define custom indicator
const myIndicator = defineIndicator({
  name: 'myInd' as const,
  compute: (candles, opts) => { /* return Series<T> */ },
  defaultOptions: { period: 20 },
  buildKey: (opts) => `myInd_${opts.period}`,
});

// Use in fluent API
TrendCraft.from(candles).use(myIndicator, { period: 10 }).compute();

// Built-in plugins for dynamic use
TrendCraft.from(candles).use(plugins.sma, { period: 50 }).use(plugins.rsi).compute();
```

Built-in plugins: `plugins.sma`, `plugins.ema`, `plugins.rsi`, `plugins.macd`, `plugins.bollingerBands`, `plugins.atr`, `plugins.volumeMa`, `plugins.highest`, `plugins.lowest`, `plugins.returns`, `plugins.parabolicSar`, `plugins.keltnerChannel`, `plugins.cmf`, `plugins.volumeAnomaly`, `plugins.volumeProfileSeries`, `plugins.volumeTrend`.

## Incremental Indicators

```typescript
import { incremental } from 'trendcraft';

// Stateful indicators for streaming (O(1) per candle)
const rsi = incremental.createRsi({ period: 14 });
const sma = incremental.createSma({ period: 20 });
const atr = incremental.createAtr({ period: 14 });

const result = rsi.next(candle); // { time, value }
const preview = rsi.peek(candle); // Preview without advancing state
const state = rsi.getState(); // Serialize for persistence
```

## Result Type

```typescript
import { ok, err, unwrapOr, tryCatch } from 'trendcraft';
type Result<T, E> = { ok: true; value: T } | { ok: false; error: E };

// Safe variants available for error handling
import { gridSearchSafe, walkForwardAnalysisSafe, runMonteCarloSimulationSafe } from 'trendcraft';
```

## Signal Explainability

Traces why a signal fired, which indicators contributed, and generates human-readable narratives.

```typescript
import { explainSignal, explainCondition, rsiBelow, rsiAbove, and, goldenCrossCondition } from 'trendcraft';

// Full signal explanation (entry + exit)
const explanation = explainSignal(candles, 50, and(goldenCrossCondition(), rsiBelow(40)), rsiAbove(70));
console.log(explanation.fired);          // true/false
console.log(explanation.signalType);     // "entry" | "exit"
console.log(explanation.narrative);      // "Entry signal fired at close=150. goldenCross: passed AND rsiBelow(30): passed (rsi14 = 28.5)."
console.log(explanation.contributions);  // [{ name, passed, indicatorValues }]

// Single condition trace
const trace = explainCondition(candles, 50, rsiBelow(30));
// trace: { name, passed, indicatorValues: { rsi14: 28.5 }, reason, type, children? }

// Generate narrative (supports "en" and "ja")
import { generateNarrative } from 'trendcraft';
const text = generateNarrative(trace, 'entry', true, candle, 'ja');
```

Options: `includeValues` (boolean), `maxDepth` (number), `language` ('en' | 'ja').

Types: `SignalExplanation`, `ConditionTrace`, `ExplainOptions`.

## Composable Indicator Algebra

Functional composition for chaining indicator calculations.

```typescript
import { pipe, compose, through, applyIndicator, extractField, mapValues, combineSeries, seriesToCandles } from 'trendcraft';

// EMA of RSI using pipe
const smoothedRsi = pipe(
  candles,
  c => rsi(c, { period: 14 }),
  through(ema, { period: 9 }),
);

// Bollinger Bands of MACD histogram
const bbOfHist = pipe(
  candles,
  c => macd(c),
  s => extractField(s, 'histogram'),
  through(bollingerBands, { period: 20 }),
);

// compose: right-to-left composition
const fn = compose(
  (s: Series<number|null>) => applyIndicator(s, ema, { period: 9 }),
  (c: NormalizedCandle[]) => rsi(c, { period: 14 }),
);

// Adapters
const pseudoCandles = seriesToCandles(rsiSeries);
const histogram = extractField(macdSeries, 'histogram');
const normalized = mapValues(rsiSeries, v => v !== null ? v / 100 : null);
const spread = combineSeries(seriesA, seriesB, (a, b) => a !== null && b !== null ? a - b : null);
```

## Alpha Decay Monitor

Tracks whether a strategy's predictive power degrades over time.

```typescript
import { analyzeAlphaDecay, createObservationsFromTrades, createObservationsFromScores, spearmanCorrelation } from 'trendcraft';

// From backtest trades
const observations = createObservationsFromTrades(result.trades);
const decay = analyzeAlphaDecay(observations, { window: 60, cusumThreshold: 4.0 });
// decay.assessment.status: "healthy" | "warning" | "degraded" | "critical"
// decay.assessment.currentIC, decay.assessment.halfLife
// decay.rollingIC, decay.rollingHitRate, decay.breaks (CUSUM structural breaks)

// From signal scores
const obs = createObservationsFromScores(scoreSeries, candles, 5);

// Statistics
const { rho, pValue } = spearmanCorrelation([1, 2, 3], [10, 20, 30]);
```

Types: `AlphaDecayResult`, `DecayObservation`, `DecayAssessment`, `AlphaDecayOptions`.

## Adaptive Indicators

Indicators whose parameters adjust based on market conditions.

```typescript
import { adaptiveRsi, adaptiveBollinger, adaptiveMa, adaptiveStochastics } from 'trendcraft';

// RSI with volatility-adaptive period (high vol → short period, low vol → long period)
const arsi = adaptiveRsi(candles, { basePeriod: 14, minPeriod: 6, maxPeriod: 28, atrPeriod: 14, volLookback: 100 });
// Series<{ rsi: number|null, effectivePeriod: number, volatilityPercentile: number|null }>

// Bollinger Bands with kurtosis-adaptive multiplier (fat tails → wider bands)
const abb = adaptiveBollinger(candles, { period: 20, baseStdDev: 2, kurtosisLookback: 100, minMultiplier: 1.5, maxMultiplier: 3.0 });
// Series<{ upper, middle, lower, bandwidth, effectiveMultiplier, kurtosis }>

// MA with efficiency-ratio-adaptive smoothing (trending → fast, choppy → slow)
const ama = adaptiveMa(candles, { erPeriod: 10 });
// Series<{ value: number|null, efficiencyRatio: number|null, smoothingConstant: number|null }>

// Stochastics with ADX-adaptive lookback (strong trend → longer period)
const astoch = adaptiveStochastics(candles, { basePeriod: 14, adxThreshold: 40 });
// Series<{ k: number|null, d: number|null, effectivePeriod: number, adx: number|null }>
```

## Strategy Robustness Score

Composite robustness grading (A+ to F) for backtest strategies.

```typescript
import { quickRobustnessScore, calculateRobustnessScore, scoreToGrade } from 'trendcraft';

// Quick assessment from a single BacktestResult (no re-running needed)
const quick = quickRobustnessScore(result, { monteCarloSimulations: 300 });
// quick.compositeScore (0-100), quick.grade ("A+" to "F")
// quick.dimensions: { monteCarlo, tradeConsistency, drawdownResilience }
// quick.assessment, quick.recommendations

// Full analysis (requires candles + strategy definition + parameter ranges)
const full = calculateRobustnessScore(candles, result, (params) => ({
  entry: and(rsiBelow(params.rsi), goldenCrossCondition(params.short, params.long)),
  exit: rsiAbove(70),
}), [
  { name: 'rsi', min: 20, max: 40, step: 5 },
  { name: 'short', min: 3, max: 10, step: 1 },
  { name: 'long', min: 20, max: 40, step: 5 },
]);
// full.dimensions: { monteCarlo, parameterSensitivity, walkForward, regimeConsistency }

scoreToGrade(92); // "A+"  — Grade scale: A+(90+), A(80+), B+(70+), B(60+), C+(50+), C(40+), D(25+), F(<25)
```

Types: `QuickRobustnessResult`, `RobustnessResult`, `RobustnessGrade`, `DimensionScore`.

## Pairs Trading

Statistical arbitrage tools: cointegration testing, spread calculation, mean reversion analysis.

```typescript
import { analyzePair, adfTest, calculateSpread, analyzeMeanReversion, olsRegression } from 'trendcraft';

// Full pairs analysis
const result = analyzePair(
  candlesGOOG.map(c => ({ time: c.time, value: c.close })),
  candlesMSFT.map(c => ({ time: c.time, value: c.close })),
  { significanceLevel: 0.05, entryThreshold: 2.0, exitThreshold: 0.5, maxHalfLife: 100 },
);
// result.cointegration: { isCointegrated, adfStatistic, pValue, hedgeRatio, intercept, rSquared }
// result.meanReversion: { halfLife, lambda, isMeanReverting, hurstExponent }
// result.spreadSeries: SpreadPoint[] (time, spread, zScore, mean, stdDev)
// result.signals: PairsSignal[] (open_long, open_short, close)
// result.assessment: { isViable, reason, confidenceFactor }

// Individual functions
const adf = adfTest(residuals); // { adfStatistic, pValue, criticalValues, lag }
const spread = calculateSpread(pricesA, pricesB, hedgeRatio, intercept, times);
const mr = analyzeMeanReversion(spreads); // { halfLife, lambda, isMeanReverting, hurstExponent }
const reg = olsRegression(x, y); // { beta, intercept, rSquared, residuals }
```

Types: `PairsAnalysisResult`, `SpreadPoint`, `PairsSignal`, `MeanReversionResult`.

## Cross-Asset Correlation

Rolling correlation, regime detection, lead-lag analysis, and intermarket divergence.

```typescript
import { analyzeCorrelation, rollingCorrelation, pearsonCorrelation, spearmanRankCorrelation, detectCorrelationRegimes, analyzeLeadLag, detectIntermarketDivergence } from 'trendcraft';

// Full correlation analysis
const analysis = analyzeCorrelation(
  candlesSPY.map(c => ({ time: c.time, value: c.close })),
  candlesQQQ.map(c => ({ time: c.time, value: c.close })),
  { window: 60, maxLag: 10, divergenceLookback: 20, divergenceThreshold: 2.0 },
);
// analysis.rollingCorrelation: CorrelationPoint[] (time, pearson, spearman)
// analysis.regimes: CorrelationRegimePoint[] (regime: strong_positive|positive|neutral|negative|strong_negative)
// analysis.leadLag: { optimalLag, crossCorrelation, maxCorrelation, assessment }
// analysis.divergences: DivergencePoint[] (type: bullish|bearish, returnA, returnB, significance)
// analysis.summary: { avgCorrelation, stability, currentRegime, dominantRegime }

// Individual functions
const corr = rollingCorrelation(returnsA, returnsB, times, 60);
const r = pearsonCorrelation(x, y);   // -1 to 1
const rs = spearmanRankCorrelation(x, y); // -1 to 1
const regimes = detectCorrelationRegimes(corr, { regimeThresholds: { strongPositive: 0.7 } });
const leadLag = analyzeLeadLag(returnsA, returnsB, { maxLag: 5 });
const divs = detectIntermarketDivergence(pricesA, pricesB, times);
```

Types: `CorrelationAnalysisResult`, `CorrelationPoint`, `CorrelationRegimePoint`, `LeadLagResult`, `DivergencePoint`.

## CLI Tools

```bash
# Stock screening
npx trendcraft-screen ./data --entry "goldenCross,volumeAnomaly" --exit "deadCross" --min-atr 2.3

# Backtesting
npx trendcraft-backtest ./data --entry "goldenCross" --exit "deadCross" --stop-loss 5 --take-profit 10

# Trade analysis
npx trendcraft-analyze ./data/trades.json

# List available conditions
npx trendcraft-screen --list
npx trendcraft-backtest --list
```

Output formats: `--output table` (default), `--output json`, `--output csv`.
